events.title: Sound of America (musical)
events.description: Ongoing musical running July 1–August 1 (spans the target week).

events.title: Parks on Tap at Historic Rittenhouse Town
events.description: Roving pop-up beer garden at Historic Rittenhouse Town, July 22–26. Free to enter; food and drink for sale. Outdoor community gathering.

events.title: Make the World Better Concert Weekend (Pavement / Kurt Vile)
events.description: Benefit concert weekend supporting a $25M effort to rehab rec centers and parks for local youth. July 24: Pavement headlines with Ratboys. July 25: Kurt Vile and the Violators.
